StarWalkway, korean couple walking slowly together through a surreal star light installation at night,

The background is completely and absolutely black: no environment, no ground, no sky, no depth, no gradients, no shadows, no reflections, no visible surfaces of any kind. Everything except the LED stars is swallowed by a pure black void.

Only floating star-shaped LED ornaments exist — pure white — suspended in infinite darkness at varying depths and heights, like a drifting constellation. Their light blooms into large soft overexposed halos with strong glow diffusion, cinematic bloom, and analog film halation, but does NOT illuminate the environment.

The stars softly flicker and drift, creating a surreal zero-gravity feeling.

The walkway is invisible. The surroundings do not exist. No ambient light whatsoever. No bounce light. No indirect lighting.

A quiet, intimate, dreamlike, emotionally isolated atmosphere inside an infinite void.
